nodes.name: Fraseria
nodes.summary: Fraseria（Fraseria）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联8种鸟类，如White-browed forest flycatcher、Fraser's forest flycatcher、Grey-throated tit-flycatcher等8种鸟类。

nodes.name: Grey-throated tit-flycatcher
nodes.summary: The grey-throated tit-flycatcher (Fraseria griseigularis) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is widespread across the African tropical rainforest. References
